_doc: V4 canonical evolution lines. Single source of truth for BOTH the art engine (scripts/gen-art.mjs reads this) and the backend (web/src/data/lines.ts re-exports). A pet is bonded to a LINE head (= one of these keys, also the quiz archetype). Care steers the TEEN fork into a within-lineage variant: feed→nourish branch, clean+play→engage branch, doctor→tend branch, balanced→the line's own true form. species_id is the line key for the true form, or `<line>__<variant>` for a branch.

mochi_pudding.name: 抖抖布丁
mochi_pudding.trueBlurb: 软乎乎的本心，一切照旧最幸福

feed.name: 圆奶冻
feed.blurb: 越喂越圆润，叠起奶油层、揣着樱桃

engage.name: 跳跳冻
engage.blurb: 陪玩出弹力，蹬起小短腿、停不下来弹跳

tend.name: 守心冻
tend.blurb: 悉心照料出一颗发光的心核与小光环

echo_fox.name: 墨影狐
echo_fox.trueBlurb: 清冷的本心，距离感里藏着偏爱

feed.name: 绒裘狐
feed.blurb: 喂养出蓬松双绒尾与脸颊绒毛

engage.name: 流影狐
engage.blurb: 陪玩梳理出流线身形、长鞭尾与月痕

tend.name: 守灯狐
tend.blurb: 照护中尾尖燃起焰火、浮起守护灵点

ember_imp.name: 炸毛团
ember_imp.trueBlurb: 一点就炸的本心，要你随时都在

feed.name: 饱嗝魔
feed.blurb: 喂成圆滚滚的大肚，火苗也犯起懒

engage.name: 噼啪魔
engage.blurb: 越玩越带电，迸出闪电弧与尖刺火焰

tend.name: 炉心魔
tend.blurb: 安抚出胸口炉心与稳重的护甲身板

sproutling.name: 探探芽
sproutling.trueBlurb: 好奇的本心，拉着你去看看新鲜

feed.name: 饱穗芽
feed.blurb: 喂养出累累垂穗与一颗红果

engage.name: 风信芽
engage.blurb: 陪玩生出叶翼、轻盈追风

tend.name: 眠墩芽
tend.blurb: 静养成长着青苔的石壳，敦实安稳
